---
title: "Courses"
description: "Courses taught by Fabien Candau at UPPA: econometrics, macroeconomics, economic geography, microeconomics."
---

## Econométrie

**Econometrics (M1, 2023–)** — lecture slides:

1. [The Linear Model](https://fcandau.github.io/Econometry_M1/Basic/Lecture/basics_web.html) · [PDF](https://fcandau.github.io/Econometry_M1/Basic/Lecture/basics.pdf)
2. [Time Series](https://fcandau.github.io/Econometry_M1/time_series/Lecture/timeseries.pdf)
3. [Panel Data](https://fcandau.github.io/Econometry_M1/Panel/Lecture/panel.pdf)
4. [Instrumental Variables & Shift-Share](https://fcandau.github.io/Econometry_M1/IV_Shift_Share/Lecture/IV_ShiftShare.pdf)
5. [Difference-in-Differences](https://fcandau.github.io/Econometry_M1/DiD/Lecture/did.pdf)

- [Inférence causale, Introduction (L3, 2021–)](https://elearn.univ-pau.fr/enrol/index.php?id=16980)
- [Econometrics Applied to Energy and Environmental Issues (M1, 2022–)](https://elearn.univ-pau.fr/enrol/index.php?id=19945)

## Macroéconomie

- [Economie des Politiques Sociales (L3, 2024–)](https://elearn.univ-pau.fr/enrol/index.php?id=22477)
- [Macroéconomie, Introduction (L1, 2006–2024)](https://elearn.univ-pau.fr/course/info.php?id=7372&lang=en)

## From Local to Global

- [Urban and Regional Economics (M1, 2010–)](https://elearn.univ-pau.fr/course/info.php?id=236)
- Economic Geography (M2, 2006–)
- [Système d'Information Géographique (M2, 2023–)](https://elearn.univ-pau.fr/enrol/index.php?id=21443)
- [Territorial Issues of Transition (M1, 2022–)](https://elearn.univ-pau.fr/enrol/index.php?id=20122)
- [Modélisation des flux commerciaux (L3, 2015–)](https://elearn.univ-pau.fr/course/view.php?id=7255)
- Economie Internationale (L3, 2008–2021)

## Microéconomie

- Microéconomie, Introduction (L1, 2006–2021)
- Microéconomie (L2, 2010–2015)

## Archives

- Economie du Développement (L3, 2006–2008)
- Economie de l'environnement (L3, 2010–2013)
